subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 15/26] server41tests: verify child attributes in ADD notification

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to verify that child attributes are included in the ADD notification sent by the server when a new file is created. The test creates a directory delegation, opens a file from a second client, and then verifies that the ADD notification includes the correct size attribute for the newly created file.
